auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Neon API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Account settings > API keys in the Neon Console: https://neon.com/docs/manage/api-keys.

actions.name: create_branch
actions.description: Create a branch in a Neon project.

parentId.description: Parent branch ID used as the source for the new branch.

parentLsn.description: Log Sequence Number on the parent branch used to create the new branch.

parentTimestamp.description: Point-in-time timestamp on the parent branch used to create the new branch.

protected.description: Whether the branch should be protected.

initSource.description: How the new branch should be initialized from the parent branch.

parentId.description: Parent branch ID, when the branch has one.

parentLsn.description: Parent Log Sequence Number, when present.

parentTimestamp.description: Parent point-in-time timestamp used for the branch, when present.

currentState.description: Current state reported by Neon for the branch.

pendingState.description: Pending state reported by Neon for the branch, when present.

logicalSize.description: Logical size of the branch in bytes, when present.

default.description: Whether the branch is the project's default branch.

cpuUsedSec.description: Deprecated CPU seconds metric reported by Neon, when present.

computeTimeSeconds.description: Observed compute time in seconds for the branch.

activeTimeSeconds.description: Observed active time in seconds for the branch.

writtenDataBytes.description: Write bytes measured for the branch.

dataTransferBytes.description: Data transfer bytes measured for the branch.

initSource.description: Initialization source used to create the branch, when present.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp for the branch, when present.

lastResetAt.description: Timestamp when the branch was last reset, when present.

ttlIntervalSeconds.description: Original time-to-live interval for the branch, when present.

createdBy.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

restoreStatus.description: Restore status reported by Neon, when present.

restoredFrom.description: Snapshot ID used as the restore source, when present.

restoredAs.description: Branch ID replaced by this restore result, when present.

items.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

restrictedActions.description: Actions currently restricted for this branch, when present.

branchId.description: Branch ID associated with the operation, when present.

endpointId.description: Endpoint ID associated with the operation, when present.

action.description: Action performed by the Neon operation.

status.description: Current status of the Neon operation.

error.description: Error message reported for the operation, when present.

failuresCount.description: Number of failures recorded for the operation.

retryAt.description: Timestamp when the operation will retry, when present.

totalDurationMs.description: Total duration of the operation in milliseconds.

operations.description: Operations triggered by the branch mutation request.

outputSchema.description: Result of a Neon branch mutation.

actions.name: create_database
actions.description: Create a database in a Neon branch.

name.description: Name of the database to create.

ownerName.description: Role name that should own the new database.
Role name that owns the database.

branchId.description: Branch ID associated with the operation, when present.

endpointId.description: Endpoint ID associated with the operation, when present.

action.description: Action performed by the Neon operation.

status.description: Current status of the Neon operation.

error.description: Error message reported for the operation, when present.

failuresCount.description: Number of failures recorded for the operation.

retryAt.description: Timestamp when the operation will retry, when present.

totalDurationMs.description: Total duration of the operation in milliseconds.

operations.description: Operations triggered by the database mutation request.

outputSchema.description: Result of a Neon database mutation.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a Neon project with an optional default branch configuration.

orgId.description: Organization ID used to scope project listing or creation.

pgVersion.description: Postgres major version to provision for the project.

storePasswords.description: Whether Neon should store role passwords for the project.

historyRetentionSeconds.description: Shared history retention period in seconds.

platformId.description: Cloud platform identifier for the project.

regionId.description: Cloud region identifier for the project.

provisioner.description: Neon provisioner used by the project.

pgVersion.description: Postgres major version configured for the project.

proxyHost.description: Proxy host used to connect to the project.

branchLogicalSizeLimit.description: Logical size limit per branch in MiB.

branchLogicalSizeLimitBytes.description: Logical size limit per branch in bytes.

storePasswords.description: Whether role passwords are stored for the project.

historyRetentionSeconds.description: Shared history retention period in seconds.

ownerId.description: User or organization owner ID for the project.

orgId.description: Organization ID that owns the project, when present.

orgName.description: Organization name that owns the project, when present.

activeTime.description: Observed active time in seconds for list responses, when present.

activeTimeSeconds.description: Observed active time in seconds for detailed responses, when present.

computeTimeSeconds.description: Observed compute time in seconds for the project, when present.

dataTransferBytes.description: Egress bytes measured for the project, when present.

writtenDataBytes.description: Write-ahead log bytes measured for the project, when present.

dataStorageBytesHour.description: Accumulated storage consumption in bytes-hour, when present.

consumptionPeriodStart.description: Timestamp when the current consumption period started, when present.

consumptionPeriodEnd.description: Timestamp when the current consumption period ends, when present.

computeLastActiveAt.description: Most recent timestamp when any endpoint in the project was active.

deletedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was deleted, when present.

recoverableUntil.description: Timestamp until which the deleted project remains recoverable, when present.

defaultEndpointSettings.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

settings.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

owner.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

parentLsn.description: Parent Log Sequence Number, when present.

parentTimestamp.description: Parent point-in-time timestamp used for the branch, when present.

currentState.description: Current state reported by Neon for the branch.

ttlIntervalSeconds.description: Original time-to-live interval for the branch, when present.

createdBy.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

restoreStatus.description: Restore status reported by Neon, when present.

restoredFrom.description: Snapshot ID used as the restore source, when present.

restoredAs.description: Branch ID replaced by this restore result, when present.

items.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

restrictedActions.description: Actions currently restricted for this branch, when present.

ownerName.description: Role name that owns the database.

databases.description: Databases Neon returned as part of the project creation response.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the currently authenticated Neon user profile.

id.description: Unique identifier of the authenticated Neon user.

email.description: Email address of the authenticated Neon user.

login.description: Deprecated login identifier reported by Neon.

name.description: Given name of the authenticated Neon user.

lastName.description: Family name of the authenticated Neon user.

image.description: Avatar URL of the authenticated Neon user.

activeSecondsLimit.description: Active endpoint seconds available to the user plan.

projectsLimit.description: Project limit of the authenticated Neon user.

branchesLimit.description: Branch limit of the authenticated Neon user.

maxAutoscalingLimit.description: Maximum autoscaling limit in Compute Units for the user plan.

computeSecondsLimit.description: Compute seconds limit for the user plan, when present.

plan.description: Current plan name for the authenticated Neon user.

items.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.

authAccounts.description: Authentication accounts attached to the Neon user.

billingAccount.description: A JSON object returned by Neon.
